scripts.test: bun run test:bun && bun install --cwd incubator/dependency-upgrade/fixture --frozen-lockfile && bun --cwd incubator/dependency-upgrade/fixture test && npm ci --prefix incubator/crust --ignore-scripts && npm test --prefix incubator/crust
scripts.test:bun: bun test test/registry.test.ts && bun test incubator/dependency-upgrade/test/ && bun test incubator/email-review-send/test/ && bun test incubator/hello-world/examples/hello-1/test/ && bun test incubator/hello-world/examples/hello-2-codeauth/test/
scripts.test:crust: npm ci --prefix incubator/crust --ignore-scripts && npm test --prefix incubator/crust
